requirement_topic.en: EAPC Classification — Motor Power and Assisted Speed Limit
requirement_topic.zh: EAPC分类——电机功率与助力速度限制
requirement_topic.zht: EAPC分類——電機功率與助力速度限制

summary.en: Under the current GOV.UK EAPC rules and the Electrically Assisted Pedal Cycles Regulations 1983 (SI 1983/1168, as amended), an e-bike can be treated as an Electrically Assisted Pedal Cycle only if it has pedals that can propel it, its motor has a continuous rated power output of no more than 250 W, and the motor must not be able to propel the bike when it is travelling at more than 15.5 mph. GOV.UK also states that a bike that can be propelled up to 15.5 mph without pedalling, such as a twist-and-go model, needs vehicle approval. EAPCs are treated as pedal cycles, so no registration, tax, driving licence, or insurance is required. A vehicle outside the EAPC rules is classed as a motorcycle or moped and requires the relevant approval, registration, tax, insurance, and licence route.
summary.zh: 根据当前GOV.UK EAPC规则及《1983年电动助力自行车法规》（SI 1983/1168，经修订），电动自行车只有在具备可驱动车辆的脚踏板、电机连续额定功率不超过250 W，且电机在车辆行驶速度超过15.5英里/小时时不能继续驱动车辆的情况下，才可作为电动助力自行车（EAPC）处理。GOV.UK还说明，如车辆可在不踩踏的情况下由电机驱动至15.5英里/小时，例如“twist-and-go”车型，则需要车辆批准。EAPC被视为脚踏自行车，因此无需登记、缴税、驾驶执照或保险。不符合EAPC规则的车辆会被归类为摩托车或轻便摩托车，并须走相应的批准、登记、缴税、保险及驾照路径。
summary.zht: 根據當前GOV.UK EAPC規則及《1983年電動助力自行車法規》（SI 1983/1168，經修訂），電動自行車只有在具備可驅動車輛的踏板、電機連續額定功率不超過250 W，且電機在車輛行駛速度超過15.5英里/小時時不能繼續驅動車輛的情況下，才可作為電動助力自行車（EAPC）處理。GOV.UK還說明，如車輛可在不踩踏的情況下由電機驅動至15.5英里/小時，例如「twist-and-go」車型，則需要車輛批准。EAPC被視為踏板自行車，因此無需登記、繳稅、駕駛執照或保險。不符合EAPC規則的車輛會被歸類為摩托車或輕便摩托車，並須走相應的批准、登記、繳稅、保險及駕照路徑。

standards_or_laws: GOV.UK — Riding an electric bike: the rules
SI 1983/1168 — Electrically Assisted Pedal Cycles Regulations 1983 (as amended)
BS EN 15194:2017 — Cycles — Electrically power assisted cycles — EPAC Bicycles (UK-adopted standard)

summary.en: China classifies electric bicycles under GB 17761-2018 (Safety Technical Specifications for Electric Bicycles), mandatory since 15 April 2019 and enforced by SAMR. Key Chinese limits differ from UK EAPC: maximum motor power 400 W (not 250 W continuous rated), maximum speed 25 km/h (same as UK), maximum unladen vehicle mass 55 kg, and a mandatory pedalling requirement. GB 17761-2018 also requires the bicycle frame to bear a CCC (China Compulsory Certification) mark. Electric bicycles exceeding GB 17761-2018 limits are classified as electric mopeds under GB 24155 and require a licence plate and driver's licence in China.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB 17761-2018（电动自行车安全技术规范）对电动自行车进行分类，该标准自2019年4月15日起强制实施，由市场监管总局负责执行。中国主要限值与英国EAPC存在差异：电机最大功率400 W（而非250 W持续额定功率）、最高速度25 km/h（与英国相同）、整车空载质量不超过55 kg，并强制要求具备脚踏功能。GB 17761-2018还要求车架须取得中国强制认证（CCC）标志。超出GB 17761-2018限制的电动自行车在中国被归类为电动轻便摩托车（依据GB 24155），须进行车牌登记并持有驾驶执照。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB 17761-2018（電動自行車安全技術規範）對電動自行車進行分類，該標準自2019年4月15日起強制實施，由市場監管總局負責執行。中國主要限值與英國EAPC存在差異：電機最大功率400 W（而非250 W持續額定功率）、最高速度25 km/h（與英國相同）、整車空載質量不超過55 kg，並強制要求具備踏板功能。GB 17761-2018還要求車架須取得中國強制認證（CCC）標誌。超出GB 17761-2018限制的電動自行車在中國被歸類為電動輕便摩托車（依據GB 24155），須進行車牌登記並持有駕駛執照。

standards_or_laws: GB 17761-2018 — Safety Technical Specifications for Electric Bicycles (SAMR, mandatory from 15 April 2019)
GB 24155-2020 — Safety Technical Specifications for Electric Mopeds and Electric Motorcycles

gap.en: The critical classification gap is motor power and propulsion mode: UK EAPC status is limited to a motor with no more than 250 W continuous rated power and no motor propulsion above 15.5 mph, while GB 17761-2018 permits up to 400 W. A Chinese e-bike with a 350 W or 400 W motor does not qualify as a UK EAPC and is treated as a moped or motorcycle route product. Models that can be propelled without pedalling, including twist-and-go designs, may need vehicle approval even if propulsion is limited to 15.5 mph. Exporters must re-rate or replace the motor, control assisted speed, and remove or approve throttle-only modes before relying on EAPC classification. The Chinese 55 kg vehicle weight limit has no direct UK EAPC equivalent, but CCC marks issued under GB 17761-2018 are not recognised in the UK.
gap.zh: 关键分类差距在于电机功率及驱动模式：英国EAPC仅允许电机连续额定功率不超过250 W，且电机不得在车辆速度超过15.5英里/小时时继续驱动车辆；GB 17761-2018则允许最高400 W。配备350 W或400 W电机的中国电动自行车不符合英国EAPC资格，将按轻便摩托车或摩托车路径处理。可在不踩踏情况下由电机驱动的车型，包括“twist-and-go”设计，即使最高驱动速度限于15.5英里/小时，也可能需要车辆批准。出口商须对电机重新评级或更换，控制助力速度，并取消纯油门模式或取得相应批准，方可依赖EAPC分类。中国55 kg整车重量限制在英国EAPC规则中没有直接对应，但依据GB 17761-2018颁发的CCC标志在英国不予认可。
gap.zht: 關鍵分類差距在於電機功率及驅動模式：英國EAPC僅允許電機連續額定功率不超過250 W，且電機不得在車輛速度超過15.5英里/小時時繼續驅動車輛；GB 17761-2018則允許最高400 W。配備350 W或400 W電機的中國電動自行車不符合英國EAPC資格，將按輕便摩托車或摩托車路徑處理。可在不踩踏情況下由電機驅動的車型，包括「twist-and-go」設計，即使最高驅動速度限於15.5英里/小時，也可能需要車輛批准。出口商須對電機重新評級或更換，控制助力速度，並取消純油門模式或取得相應批准，方可依賴EAPC分類。中國55 kg整車重量限制在英國EAPC規則中沒有直接對應，但依據GB 17761-2018頒發的CCC標誌在英國不予認可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — compliance with SI 1983/1168 determines EAPC classification; non-compliant vehicles require L-category type approval under the Road Vehicles (Approval) Regulations 2020
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17761-2018 compliance and CCC certification required for all electric bicycles sold in China under SAMR enforcement

requirement_topic.en: BS EN 15194:2017 — UK EAPC Electrical and Performance Standard
requirement_topic.zh: BS EN 15194:2017——英国EAPC电气及性能标准
requirement_topic.zht: BS EN 15194:2017——英國EAPC電氣及性能標準

summary.en: EAPCs placed on the Great Britain market must comply with the mandatory legal obligations in the Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1101) and the Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1091), where those instruments apply. BS EN 15194:2017 (Cycles — Electrically power assisted cycles — EPAC Bicycles) is a voluntary UK-designated/harmonised evidence route for EAPCs, not a mandatory legal requirement in itself. It specifies electrical safety, performance, assistance cut-off, maximum power measurement, speed sensor, EMC-related, and labelling requirements, and can support a presumption of conformity with the relevant UK regulations.
summary.zh: 投放英国大不列颠市场的EAPC，在相关法规适用时，必须符合《2016年电气设备（安全）法规》（SI 2016/1101）及《2016年电磁兼容性法规》（SI 2016/1091）中的强制性法律义务。BS EN 15194:2017（自行车——电动助力自行车——EPAC自行车）是EAPC可采用的自愿性英国指定/协调举证路径，本身并非强制性法律要求。该标准规定了电气安全、性能、助力断开、最大功率测量、速度传感器、EMC相关要求及标签要求，并可支持对相关英国法规的符合性推定。
summary.zht: 投放英國大不列顛市場的EAPC，在相關法規適用時，必須符合《2016年電氣設備（安全）法規》（SI 2016/1101）及《2016年電磁相容性法規》（SI 2016/1091）中的強制性法律義務。BS EN 15194:2017（自行車——電動助力自行車——EPAC自行車）是EAPC可採用的自願性英國指定/協調舉證路徑，本身並非強制性法律要求。該標準規定了電氣安全、性能、助力斷開、最大功率測量、速度感測器、EMC相關要求及標籤要求，並可支持對相關英國法規的符合性推定。

standards_or_laws: BS EN 15194:2017 — Cycles — Electrically power assisted cycles — EPAC Bicycles

summary.en: GB 17761-2018 is the Chinese mandatory standard covering electric bicycle safety including electrical requirements, but it differs materially from BS EN 15194:2017 in scope, test methods, and specific limits. GB 17761-2018 test reports from Chinese CQC-accredited laboratories are not accepted under the UK UKCA conformity assessment pathway. There is no bilateral mutual recognition agreement between UK accreditation bodies and CNAS for this product category.
summary.zh: GB 17761-2018是涵盖电动自行车安全（包括电气要求）的中国强制标准，但其范围、测试方法及具体限值与BS EN 15194:2017存在实质性差异。由中国CQC认可实验室出具的GB 17761-2018测试报告，在英国UKCA合格评定路径下不被接受。英国认可机构与CNAS之间就该产品类别尚无双边互认协议。
summary.zht: GB 17761-2018是涵蓋電動自行車安全（包括電氣要求）的中國強制標準，但其範圍、測試方法及具體限值與BS EN 15194:2017存在實質性差異。由中國CQC認可實驗室出具的GB 17761-2018測試報告，在英國UKCA合格評定路徑下不被接受。英國認可機構與CNAS之間就該產品類別尚無雙邊互認協議。

standards_or_laws: GB 17761-2018 — Safety Technical Specifications for Electric Bicycles (SAMR)

gap.en: Chinese e-bikes tested only to GB 17761-2018 generally need additional UK-facing evidence because GB 17761-2018 reports are not automatically accepted as proof of conformity with SI 2016/1101 or SI 2016/1091. Testing to BS EN 15194:2017 by a competent laboratory is a common voluntary route to support presumption of conformity, but the mandatory obligation is to meet the UK regulations, prepare the Technical File, draw up the UK Declaration of Conformity, and apply the required UKCA marking. The UK conformity assessment route for EAPCs is typically manufacturer self-declaration; a UK Approved Body is not generally mandatory for this route. A Chinese exporter without a UK legal entity must ensure the required UK economic operator/importer documentation is in place before market placement.
gap.zh: 仅依据GB 17761-2018完成测试的中国电动自行车，通常需要补充面向英国的合规证据，因为GB 17761-2018报告不会自动被接受为符合SI 2016/1101或SI 2016/1091的证明。由具备能力的实验室按BS EN 15194:2017测试，是支持符合性推定的常见自愿路径，但强制性义务是符合英国法规、编制技术文件、起草英国符合性声明并加贴所需UKCA标志。EAPC的英国合格评定路径通常为制造商自我声明；该路径一般不强制要求英国认可机构。没有英国法人实体的中国出口商，在投放市场前须确保所需的英国经济运营者/进口商文件安排到位。
gap.zht: 僅依據GB 17761-2018完成測試的中國電動自行車，通常需要補充面向英國的合規證據，因為GB 17761-2018報告不會自動被接受為符合SI 2016/1101或SI 2016/1091的證明。由具備能力的實驗室按BS EN 15194:2017測試，是支持符合性推定的常見自願路徑，但強制性義務是符合英國法規、編製技術文件、起草英國符合性聲明並加貼所需UKCA標誌。EAPC的英國合格評定路徑通常為製造商自我聲明；該路徑一般不強制要求英國認可機構。沒有英國法人實體的中國出口商，在投放市場前須確保所需的英國經濟運營者/進口商文件安排到位。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — applicable UK regulations, UKCA marking, Technical File, and UK Declaration of Conformity obligations apply; BS EN 15194:2017 is a voluntary designated/harmonised standard that may confer presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17761-2018 compliance and CCC certification required under SAMR enforcement
